feat.name: Avatar's Protection
feat.requirement: You have an avatar spell prepared
feat.text: In moments of danger, you can call upon your god’s form in an instant. You cast avatar from your spell slots. The triggering critical hit is reduced to a normal hit, and its damage is applied after gaining the avatar spell’s temporary Hit Points.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

feat.trigger: You are critically hit by an enemy
